violations.text: Menu is lacking an allergen statement. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2025

Molluscan shellfish tags must be maintained for 90 days in chronological order and the date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2025

Foods are served raw or undercooked to the customer's request. A written consumer advisory (on the menu, table tent, or placard) is not provided to the consumer informing them of the significantly increased risk associated with certain vulnerable consumers eating such food in a raw or undercooked form. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2025
Spray bottles used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dishwashers. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2025
The ceiling in the dry storage area is not covered with tiles/materials that are smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2026

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher in the prep room was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Per interview, PIC indicated that they will be replacing dishwasher with a high temp machine in the near future. Until then, establishment is to use 3-bay sink to complete the proper wash, rinse, and sanitize procedure. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2024

The ceiling in the dry storage/ foodware area is not made of approved materials (non-covered insulation). Ceiling materials must be smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024
